description:
Please kill what you can. Take each numbered position individually (assume there are no other stones around), and do them in ascending order.
Important: Don't try to kill groups that are already alive or already dead. That means you may need to skip some positions.
Finally, if you plan to play in the lower right corner, please start on the right side (not the lower side).
